citation.description: test_lifespan_drains_queued_events_on_shutdown drives appmod.lifespan and asserts all 5 queued events are processed. Implementation: app.py lines 125-128 await asyncio.wait_for(queue.join(), ...) before cancelling workers.

criteria.criterion: On lifespan shutdown with items still queued, the items are drained (processed by the worker) rather than dropped; before the fix they are dropped. Proving command: `-k shutdown_drain` passes.

citation.description: test_lifespan_drain_is_bounded sets SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_SECONDS=0.1, enqueues a hung review, and asserts shutdown returns within a 5s outer guard. Implementation: app.py line 127-128 uses contextlib.suppress(asyncio.TimeoutError) around wait_for(queue.join(), timeout=_shutdown_drain_seconds()).

criteria.criterion: The drain is bounded: if draining exceeds SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_SECONDS, shutdown still completes (does not hang) and remaining items are left for the reconciler.

citation.description: test_reconcile_once_times_out_a_hung_review_and_continues patches review_and_vote to sleep(3600), sets REVIEW_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=0.05, and asserts reconcile_once returns {scanned:1, reviewed:0} within 5s. Implementation: reconcile.py lines 221-228 wrap review_and_vote in asyncio.wait_for with review_timeout_seconds(), catching TimeoutError → _degraded() + continue.

criteria.criterion: reconcile_once does not hang on a review that never returns: a review exceeding the timeout is abandoned, a marker is emitted, and the loop proceeds to the next candidate. Proving command: `-k reconcile_timeout` passes.

citation.description: stop_grace_period: 60s is set on the review-bot service. Also verified by test_reviewbot_compose_sets_stop_grace_period (test_review_bot.py line 1327).

criteria.criterion: infra/compose/docker-compose.yml sets stop_grace_period on the review-bot service.

citation.description: The code is structurally sound: imports are consistent, review_timeout_seconds is imported from config (shared helper, no import cycle), all new functionality is properly integrated. Cannot run tests, but no structural issues found that would break existing gates.

criteria.criterion: Existing gates stay green: `make lint && make typecheck && python -m pytest tests/unit/test_review_bot.py -q` all exit 0.
